AboutDialog.Text_PrivacyText: This application does not collect any personal data. No data is shared with third parties as far as I know. Read more about our privacy policy.

DiscardConfirmDialog.Title: Discard Changes?
DiscardConfirmDialog.Body: Loading a script will discard your current scripts changes. Do you want to proceed and discard all changes?

NewOrOverrideDialog.Title: Override Current Script or Save as New?

HomeScreen.UnverifiedBuild_Explanation: This build is unverified. That means it may not be stable or could contain bugs. Use at your own risk. To build a verified version, please use the main_foss.dart file as your entry point.
HomeScreen.FossVersion_Explanation: We are a free and open source project. This means that you can use this app for free - for ever. All features in this app are free to you and you may use them without any restrictions. However, this is a community project which took quite a lot of work. So if you like this app and would like to see it supported into the future, please consider donating. You can find current links at the Source Code Repository.
HomeScreen.FreeVersion_Explanation:
We are a free and open source project. Sadly, maintaining TiefPrompt takes a lot of time - and frankly, money. Between development, design, and the cost of distribution (hello, Apple Developer fees), it's become a bit of a time-and-money sink for me. To keep things sustainable, I've chosen a freemium model: the app is free to use, but some features are only available in the Pro version.

If you can't or don't want to pay, you're still totally welcome to use the app or build it yourself from source - no hard feelings.

I wish it weren't necessary, but I hope you understand and still find real value in this app.
HomeScreen.PaidVersion_Explanation:
Thank you for purchasing TiefPrompt Pro! Your support means the world. You're not just unlocking extra features - you're helping this project stay alive, maintained, and hopefully even better with time. This app is a labour of love, and your contribution helps cover hosting, development, testing devices, and way too much coffee.

Seriously, thank you for making this possible.

HelpRequestScreen.Title: Help us!
HelpRequestScreen.Abstract: TL;DR: TiefPrompt is a community created and funded project. Being FOSS means everyone can contribute - but alas, there are costs to creating and publishing an app. Aside our time, the Apple tax is real. Contributing to the project really helps. I elaborate below, but check out the GitHub if you want to help out.
HelpRequestScreen.ElaborateExplanation:
You reading on already means you are interested in our project, so let me catch you up. TiefPrompt is a teleprompter application without ads, tracking, or any such monetary means most apps resort to. That means we're fully reliant on the purchases of TiefPrompt Pro, as well as donations.

Since the developers sink a lot of time and money into providing this app (e.g. lawyers to write a privacy policy, Apple Tax, so on), we decided on two means of getting funding - one is, obviously, the In-App Purchases on iOS and Android. If you've downloaded this app from Google Play or the Apple App Store, you'll notice that some features are indeed restricted. That is a side effect of Apple requiring developers to own an Apple product - something we had to specifically acquire for this project - and a yearly payment for the privilege of creating an app.

Additionally, this app is free. You may be wondering how that is possible, as I had just explained how totally not free this app is, but if you look at the link above, this app is, indeed, fully open-source. You're allowed to use, modify, sell, or really do whatever with this app. And it's free as in beer if you download it from F-Droid or GitHub, or simply compile it yourself.

That's why we don't only have an In-App Purchase option, but also donation links. If you're using the app how it was initially envisioned - that is, freely - we ask of you that you consider donating. No hard feelings if you don't, we know the financial realities, but it's a way to support us.

Aside that, making an app obviously requires time. Developing, sorting issues, planning releases - all of this, while being fun, is a strain on the devs. So if you can't or don't want to donate or pay for the app, how about you contribute to the app!

How to contribute, you ask? Well, one way is simply giving feedback. Is there a feature missing? Is the app buggy? Simply tell us, and we'll make it better!

Another way to contribute is obviously to provide code. If you're able, we'd appreciate any help on getting Issues down, making new features and fixing bugs. We're all just humans, and your support would be a big help.

Lastly, there's translations. We provide this app in multiple languages, but there's always another language, a translation error, or simply a small typo to fix. You can find how to help making translations of this app better in the GitHub repo, and we really do appreciate any help on that front as well.

And now, a personal note from the creator, because you just read through my prose and you deserve it: Thank you. Thank you for considering this app, downloading it, reading this, so on. I really do appreciate you all immensly. Seeing a project actually be used is validating and it makes me happy that I'm not alone here. So, one last time: Thank you.

Now to the last thing, there's links below, click them to find out more.

Best, Lena

BuyRequest.Generic:
## Considering upgrading?

This is the free version of TiefPrompt, and every Pro feature is one tap away.

Switch between light, dark, and custom themes to suit your studio.

Dial in the perfect scrolling pace for your delivery.

Fade text gently in and out at the edges for a smooth, professional look.
BuyRequest.sideMargins:
## Side Margins

Narrow the text column so your eyes travel less between lines.
BuyRequest.countdownTimer:

Get a countdown before scrolling begins, so you're ready on cue.

Pick any prompter background color to match your set or cut glare.

Choose your own text color for the best readability under any lighting.

Set the perfect reading size for your distance from the screen.

Align your script left, center, right, or justified.

Remap every shortcut to your own keyboard or remote control.

Learn how you can help keep TiefPrompt alive and growing.

Never loose sight of where you are - display the current chapter at the top of the screen.
BuyRequest.MainBlock:
Unlock this and every other Pro feature with a single one-time purchase. No subscription, yours forever.

Frankly, TiefPrompt is currently, other than translations, a one person project. Your purchase funds the development, allows this app to be ad and tracking and bs free, pays for the Apple fees, *and* allows me to get *an excessive amount of camera equipment*. Thank you for reading and considering!

  ~ Lena

NoPurchaseAvailable.Title: There are no purchases...
NoPurchaseAvailable.MainBody:
Oh hi! Apparently, you arrived at the purchases screen no one is supposed to see, and which only exists so the build is easier.

Well, see you! Have a nice one!
